title: [MTR3/4]Australian Narrow Trains
description: This resource pack adds 1,067mm narrow gauge train in Australia for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![MTR4 Mix testing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/319f8fe14b16a818dcbdb65244adc31998a7203a.png)

## Information

This resource pack adds to the narrow-gauge trains in Queensland and Western Australia.

This pack requires MTR Mod (MTR3, NTE or MTR4 Beta 13~)

Compatible with [1067mm Railway RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail)

## Contents

- QueensLand Rail SMU220
- QueensLand Rail IMU120
- Transperth ADL Class DMU (Red livery)
- Transperth A Series EMU
- Transperth C Series EMU
